resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def canBeTypedWords(self, text: str, brokenLetters: str) -> int:
        brokenLetters = set(brokenLetters)
        words = text.split()
        count = 0
        for word in words:
            if not set(word) & brokenLetters:
                count += 1
        return count
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(N + M)
space complexity: O(M)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses a set to store the broken letters, and then iterates over each word in the text, checking if any of the word's letters are in the set of broken letters. If not, it increments the count.
